sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Main Cannon
special_mechanics.description: Rapid-fire main weapon that can be upgraded via power-ups. Upgrades increase fire rate and bullet speed.

special_mechanics.name: Specialty Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Eight different specialty weapons with separate upgrade system from main cannon. Weapons range from directional bullets to shields to indestructible projectiles.

special_mechanics.name: Ship Flight
special_mechanics.description: Player controls starfighter AFX-6502 Zanac through 2D scrolling vertical shoot-em-up levels

special_mechanics.name: Adaptive Level Difficulty (ALC)
special_mechanics.description: Automatic Level of Difficulty Control - measures player skill via actions like fire rate, power-up collection, and boss destruction time. Increases difficulty for skilled players, decreases for inexperienced players.

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is a shmup with no documented platformer physics. Sources provide gameplay mechanics, level design, and AI system details, but no quantified movement parameters (speeds, accelerations, gravity). Game focuses on weapon systems and adaptive difficulty rather than character physics.
